**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Synchronize the a11y dump viewport**

When regenerating the Phase 3 accessibility evidence with `swift run tap-n-filter-a11y-dump`, the executable still hosts `ControlPanelView` in a 320×600 `NSHostingView` (`Sou
threads.verdict_notes: Updated the a11y-dump NSHostingView from 320x600 to 380x700 (Sources/AccessibilityDump/main.swift) to match the widened panel + snapshot helper, so regenerated Phase 3 accessibility evidence reflects the real viewport.
